title: Lyyt | 3-in-1 Rechargeable Bright Worklight: 3W COB LEDs, Secondary LED Torch, and Emergency Red LED | Features Swivel Hook, Magnet, and USB Powerbank Function
features: Versatile Lighting Options | Equipped with a 3W COB LED work light, a 1W LED torch, and an emergency triangular red LED, offering multiple lighting solutions for various needs
Convenient and Flexible Use | Features a magnetic base with a rotating bracket and a swivel hook, allowing for hands-free use and easy positioning in different environments
Rechargeable and Multi-functional | Includes a USB C charging port and a USB A socket, enabling the worklight to also serve as a powerbank for your devices
Durable Construction | Made from robust ABS and painted rubber, ensuring long-lasting durability and resistance to wear and tear
Compact and Portable | With dimensions of 215x50x35mm and a hardwired 18650 1200mAh rechargeable battery, it's easy to carry and perfect for on-the-go use
description: From the manufacturer Lyyt | Handheld Rechargeable Inspection lamp, 3 in 1 Work light The Lyyt 3-in-1 Rechargeable LED Work light is a versatile tool designed for various tasks. It features a primary 3W COB LED work light, a 1W LED secondary torch at the top, and a triangular red LED at the back for emergency warnings. The magnetic base with a rotating bracket and swivel hook offer flexibility in positioning. It includes a USB C charging port and a USB A socket, allowing it to function as a power bank. Made from durable ABS and painted rubber, the work light provides 200 lumens from the main light and 60 lumens from the torch. The dimensions are 215x50x35mm, and it comes with a hardwired 18650 1200mAh rechargeable battery. PRODUCT FEATURES & SPECIFICATION: 3W COB LED primary work light 1W LED as a secondary torch at the top Triangular red LED at the back as an emergency warning light Magnetic base with a rotating bracket Swivel hook USB C Charging Port USB A socket for power bank use Material ABS and painted rubber Brightness Main: 200 lumens Brightness Torch: 60 lumens Dimensions 215 x 50 x 35mm Batteries 1 x 18650 1200mAh Rechargeable (hardwired)
